workItems.title: Run baseline tests in CI before migration changes
workItems.rationale: A Java migration needs a known failing/passing baseline before changing runtime, framework, or build configuration.

workItems.title: Run OpenRewrite Java 25 recipe in a branch
workItems.rationale: OpenRewrite automation should be reviewable and separate from manual runtime changes.

findings.title: Maven compiler configuration should be explicit for Java 25 migration evidence
findings.evidence: No maven-compiler-plugin entry was detected in build plugins
findings.recommendation: Add explicit compiler plugin configuration or verify the effective POM so the report can explain the Java release used by CI.

findings.title: OpenRewrite has a Java 25 migration recipe
findings.recommendation: Review and run the suggested OpenRewrite recipe in a branch before manual changes.

findings.title: Map-based response can be reviewed as an explicit DTO or record
findings.recommendation: Review whether this loosely typed map represents a stable response shape. If it does, model it as a DTO now and consider a record when the target runtime supports it.
